title: phaseoloides japonicum
intro: Phaseoloides japonicum, also known as the Japanese kidney bean or Japanese variety of the Phaseolus bean, is a type of legume native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaseoloides japonicum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
